_archive_metadata.superseded_by: scores.json v1.7 — Fortinet and Versa full scoring pass
_archive_metadata.note: This is a reference snapshot of scores.json v1.6 at the moment Fortinet and Versa were scored. The live file (assets/data/scores.json) now contains the v1.7 fully-scored dataset. See TODO.md for the scoring-pass rationale.

meta.note_convention: 1-2 sentences. State what the vendor specifically does or does not do to justify the score.
meta.last_verified_convention: ISO date on criteria where scores reference PoP counts, certifications, or other time-sensitive facts. Verify quarterly or on vendor announcement.
meta.changelog: v1.6 (2026-04-19): Removed Graphiant vendor and all associated scores. v1.5 (2026-04-19): Added Fortinet and Versa Networks vendor entries. Updated Island scope_note to ZTNA+SSE following March 2026 full SASE stack launch. Scores for Fortinet and Versa are null pending full scoring pass — vendor entries establish schema structure.

_archive_summary.populated_scores_at_archive: All Big Five vendors, Aryaka (SD-WAN + AIOps pillars), Island (ZTNA + SSE pillars), Nile (ZTNA pillar only) — fully populated.
